scripts.dev: cd playerService && yarn dev & cd mainService && yarn dev & cd client && yarn dev --host
scripts.dev:s2: cd playerService && yarn dev:s2 & cd mainService && yarn dev:s2 & cd client && yarn dev:s2 --host
scripts.dev:s3: cd playerService && yarn dev:s3 & cd mainService && yarn dev:s3 & cd client && yarn dev:s3 --host
scripts.build: cd playerService && yarn build & cd mainService && yarn build & cd client && yarn build
scripts.start: cd playerService && yarn start & cd mainService && yarn start & cd client && yarn preview --host
